name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.32: Orders view groups by sale into expandable orders (click to see line items), shows HH:MM:SS, and adds a machine filter; machine detail gains a recent-orders widget (last 10, click-through to all orders for that machine) and a 1D revenue period. Cumulative over v5.31.
